Game.Name: Natsuki Crisis Battle (Japan)
Game.plot: Natsuki Crisis Battle is an Action game, developed by TOSE and published by Angel (Bandai),which was released in Japan in 1995.
Game.Notes: isumi Natsuki is a member of the karate club at Goujyu High School. Strong and very skilled, only the captain of the group, Masaoki Yanagisawa, is a match for her. Her life starts to get really complicated when a student named Rina Takaoka is transferred to her school and becomes her classmate. Takaoka's former colleagues are set to punish her for having left Jotoh Academy, a school famous for it's martial arts.
